transcript: I live my day as if it was the last Live my day as if it was no past Doin' it all night, all summer Doin' it the way I wanna Got my day, my heart up till the dawn But I won't be done

timestamps.text: I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if it was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Got my day, my heart up till the dawn
